Notice Of Demurrer Of Deft To The Second Amended Complaint; Memorandum Of P/A
Off Calendar Aug-17-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Rolanda McCully (574.8685) defendant and moving party appearing in propria persona
David Yang (982.7315) appearing for plaintiff and responding party

Discussed and the Court ruled as follows: DEFENDANT ROLANDA MCCULLY'S DEMURRER TO THE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained with 5 days leave to amend. Order signed in open court. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189

Notice Of Motion To Strike Of Deft To The Second Amended Complaint; Memorandum Of P/A
Off Calendar Aug-17-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Rolanda McCully (574.8685) defendant and moving party appearing in propria persona
David Yang (982.7315) appearing for plaintiff and responding party

Discussed and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT ROLANDA MCCULLY'S Motion To Strike The Second Amended Complaint is off calendar in light of ruling on demurrer. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-06-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Rolanda McCully, 415-574-8685, defendant and moving party appearing propria persona
Elizabeth Thomas, 415-279-8770, plaintiff and opposing party appearing propria persona

RULING:
MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
DEFENDANT ROLANDA MCCULLY'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 5 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED THERFORE THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189(301/PJB)
